let rest (ω : probSpace α R) : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R) := (fun i ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)

    · exact measurable_const

    ext ω

      rw [ih hk']
      congr 1
      simp only [Nat.succ_le_iff] at hk

      rw [this]

  let Y := fun (u : ℕ → I) ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ u i)

    iIndepFun.indepFun_prod_mk (fun i ↦ (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) _ i).comp measurable_eval)

  have : (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) ⁻¹' A ∩ rest ⁻¹' B = E := by
    ext; simp [E, X, Y, rest]
  rw [this, arrayMeasure, Measure.prod_apply]
  · simp only [E, Set.mem_prod, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_inter_iff]
    have : ∀ u, (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) {v | (X u, (Y u, v)) ∈ A ×ˢ B} =
        (Set.indicator A 1 (X u)) * (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) {v | (Y u, v) ∈ B} := by
      intro u

    simp_rw [this]
    rw [lintegral_mul_const _ (Measurable.measure_prod_mk_left hB),
      lintegral_indicator _ hA]
    swap; · exact (Measurable.measure_prod_mk_left hB).comp (by fun_prop)
    rw [IndepFun_iff_lintegral_comp_eq_mul.mp hXY]
    · simp only [Measure.infinitePi, Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) hA]
      congr 1
      rw [Measure.prod_apply hB]
    · fun_prop
    · exact (Measurable.measure_prod_mk_left hB).comp (by fun_prop)
  · exact (by fun_prop)

let trunc (u : ℕ → I) : ℕ → I := fun k ↦ if k ≤ n then u k else 0

    · exact Measurable.prod_mk (Measurable.comp h_meas_Y measurable_fst) measurable_snd
  refine IndepFun.comp (indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq_prod_map_map ?_ ?_ |>.mpr h_map_eq) measurable_fst (measurable_hist alg n)
  · exact Measurable.comp h_meas_X measurable_fst
  · exact Measurable.prod_mk (Measurable.comp h_meas_Y measurable_fst) measurable_snd

  exact h1.prod_mk_right (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)

let P := arrayMeasure ν
  let proj (ω : probSpace α R) := ((fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i), ω.2)
  let extend (p : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R)) : probSpace α R :=
    (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then p.1 ⟨k, h⟩ else 0, p.2)

  have h_meas_extend : Measurable extend := by
    refine Measurable.prodMk ?_ measurable_snd
    refine measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun k ↦ ?_)
    by_cases hk : k ≤ n
    · simp only [hk, ↓reduceDIte]
      exact (measurable_pi_apply ⟨k, hk⟩).comp measurable_fst
    · simp only [hk, ↓reduceDIte]
      exact measurable_const

  have h_hist_eq : hist alg · n = (hist alg · n) ∘ extend ∘ proj := by
    ext ω
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, extend, proj]
    suffices ∀ m, (∀ k ≤ m, ω.1 k = (if h : k ≤ n then ω.1 k else 0)) →
        hist alg ω m = hist alg (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then ω.1 k else 0, ω.2) m by
      apply this n
      intro k hk; simp [hk]
    intro m h_agree
    induction m with
    | zero =>
      simp only [hist_zero]
      congr
      exact h_agree 0 (le_refl 0)
    | succ m hm =>
      simp only [hist_add_one]
      have h_prev := hm (fun k hk ↦ h_agree k (k.le_succ.trans hk))
      rw [h_prev]
      congr 1
      apply dite_eq_iff.mpr; intro h_le
      rw [h_agree (m+1) (le_refl _)]
      congr
      exact h_prev

  rw [h_hist_eq]
  refine IndepFun.comp ?_ measurable_id (measurable_hist alg n).comp h_meas_extend

  -- Independence of projection and n+1 coordinate
  rw [arrayMeasure]
  let μ1 := Measure.infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume : ℕ → Measure I)
  let μ2 := Bandit.streamMeasure ν

  have h_indep_fst : IndepFun (fun u ↦ u (n+1)) (fun u ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ u i)) μ1 := by
    have h_disj : Disjoint {n+1} (Finset.Iic n) := by
      simp only [Finset.disjoint_singleton_left, Finset.mem_Iic, not_le]
      exact Nat.lt_succ_self n
    let f : ℕ → (ℕ → I) → I := fun i u ↦ u i
    convert iIndepFun.indepFun_finset (f := f) (i := n+1) (s := Finset.Iic n) h_disj
      (by fun_prop) (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) (fun i u ↦ u i) (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop))
    · ext; rfl
    · ext; funext; rfl

  have h_triv : IndepFun (fun _ ↦ ()) id μ2 := by
    simp [IndepFun, measurable_const]
    rw [Measure.prod_dirac_right]

  have := indepFun_prod_map h_indep_fst h_triv
  exact this.comp measurable_fst measurable_id

rw [arrayMeasure]
  let T : Finset ℕ := Finset.range (n + 1)
  -- Independence of u_{n+1} and u|_T
  have h_indep_u : IndepFun (fun u ↦ u (n + 1)) (fun u ↦ fun i : T ↦ u i)
      (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
    iIndepFun_infinitePi.indepFun_prod_mk (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
      (by rw [Set.disjoint_left]; simp; intros; linarith)
  -- Lift to joint independence on product measure
  have h_indep_joint : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (fun i : T ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2))
      ((Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).prod (streamMeasure ν)) := by
    rw [IndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul]
    intros S E hS hE
    -- E is in the product sigma algebra, generated by rectangles A × B
    refine induction_on_inter generate_from_prod_le (isPiSystem_prod _ _) ?_ ?_ ?_ hE
    · simp
    · rintro _ ⟨A, B, hA, hB, rfl⟩
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.preimage_inter, Set.preimage_setOf_eq]
      rw [Measure.prod_prod, Measure.prod_prod]
      have : {ω | (fun i : T ↦ ω.1 i) ω.1 ∈ A ∧ ω.2 ∈ B} =
          (Prod.fst ⁻¹' {u | (fun i : T ↦ u i) ∈ A}) ∩ (Prod.snd ⁻¹' B) := by ext; simp
      rw [this, Set.inter_assoc, Set.preimage_inter]
      rw [Measure.prod_apply (by fun_prop), Measure.prod_apply (by fun_prop)]
      simp only [Measure.prod_prod]
      rw [h_indep_u.measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul hS hA]
      ring
    · intro t ht eq; simp [eq]
    · intro f hf_disj hf_meas hf_eq; simp [Set.preimage_iUnion, Measure_iUnion, hf_eq]
      exact (Set.image_subset_iff.mp hf_meas).trans (by fun_prop)
  -- Express hist as a function of the independent variables
  let G : (T → I) × (ℕ → α → R) → Iic n → α × R :=
    fun p ↦ hist alg (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then p.1 ⟨k, by simp; exact Nat.lt_succ_of_le h⟩ else 0, p.2) n
  have h_eq : hist alg · n = G ∘ (fun ω ↦ (fun i : T ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) := by
    ext ω
    simp only [G, Function.comp_apply]
    congr
    funext i
    split_ifs with h
    · simp
    · simp at h
  rw [h_eq]
  exact h_indep_joint.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)

let X := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)
  let Y := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i
  let Z := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.2
  have h_indep_X_Y : IndepFun X Y (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have : iIndepFun (fun k (ω : probSpace α R) ↦ ω.1 k) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      rw [arrayMeasure, iIndepFun_prod_iff]
      exact ⟨iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop), iIndepFun_const⟩
    exact this.indepFun_prod_mk (fun i ↦ by fun_prop) (fun i ↦ by fun_prop)
      (disjoint_singleton_left.mpr (by simp))
  have h_indep_XY_Z : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (X ω, Y ω)) Z (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)) measurable_id
  have h_indep_X_YZ : IndepFun X (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [IndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    intros E F hE hF
    have h_rect : ∀ A B, MeasurableSet A → MeasurableSet B →
        (arrayMeasure ν) (X ⁻¹' E ∩ (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) ⁻¹' (A ×ˢ B)) =
        (arrayMeasure ν) (X ⁻¹' E) * (arrayMeasure ν) ((fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) ⁻¹' (A ×ˢ B)) := by
      intros A B hA hB
      rw [Set.preimage_prod_eq_inter, Set.inter_assoc,
        indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul.mp h_indep_XY_Z _ _
          (MeasurableSet.inter hE (hA.preimage (by fun_prop))) (hB.preimage (by fun_prop)),
        Set.preimage_inter, Set.inter_assoc,
        indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul.mp h_indep_X_Y _ _ hE (hA.preimage (by fun_prop)),
        ← Set.preimage_inter, mul_assoc,
        ← indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul.mp h_indep_XY_Z _ _ (hA.preimage (by fun_prop)) (hB.preimage (by fun_prop))]
      rfl
      · fun_prop
      · fun_prop
      · fun_prop
      · fun_prop
    exact MeasurableSpace.induction_on_inter (C := fun F ↦ (arrayMeasure ν) (X ⁻¹' E ∩ (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) ⁻¹' F) = (arrayMeasure ν) (X ⁻¹' E) * (arrayMeasure ν) ((fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) ⁻¹' F))
      (MeasurableSet.prod_gen (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)) (by simp) h_rect
      (by
        intro F hF h_eq
        rw [Set.preimage_compl, Set.inter_diff_distrib_left, measure_diff, measure_diff, h_eq, mul_sub]
        · exact Set.inter_subset_left
        · apply Set.inter_subset_right
        · exact (by fun_prop).inter (hF.preimage (by fun_prop))
        · exact (by fun_prop)
        · exact hF.preimage (by fun_prop)
        · exact (by fun_prop))
      (by
        intro f hf_disj hf_meas hf_eq
        rw [Set.preimage_iUnion, Set.inter_iUnion, measure_iUnion, measure_iUnion, ENNReal.mul_tsum]
        · congr with i; exact hf_eq i
        · exact hf_disj.preimage _
        · exact fun i ↦ (by fun_prop).inter ((hf_meas i).preimage (by fun_prop))
        · exact fun i ↦ (hf_meas i).preimage (by fun_prop))
      hF
  let reconstruct (p : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R)) : probSpace α R :=
    (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then p.1 ⟨k, h⟩ else 0, p.2)
  have h_meas_recon : Measurable reconstruct := by
    refine Measurable.prodMk (measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ ?_)) measurable_snd
    by_cases h : i ≤ n
    · simp [h]; exact (measurable_pi_apply ⟨i, h⟩).comp measurable_fst
    · simp [h]; exact measurable_const
  have h_hist : hist alg · n = (fun p ↦ hist alg (reconstruct p) n) ∘ (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) := by
    ext ω
    simp only [Function.comp_apply]
    apply hist_depends_on_past
    · intro k hk; simp [reconstruct, hk]
    · simp [reconstruct]
  rw [h_hist]
  exact h_indep_X_YZ.comp ((measurable_hist alg n).comp h_meas_recon) (by fun_prop)

let π_le (u : ℕ → I) : Iic n → I := fun i ↦ u i
  let π_gt (u : ℕ → I) : I := u (n + 1)
  have h_fst : IndepFun π_gt π_le (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
    iIndepFun_infinitePi.indepFun_prod_mk (fun i ↦ by fun_prop) (by simp) (by simp)
      (by intro i hi j hj; simp at hi hj; simp [hj, hi]; exact ne_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_lt hi hj))
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ π_gt ω.1) (fun ω ↦ (π_le ω.1, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [arrayMeasure, IndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul]
    intro s t hs ht
    rw [Measure.prod_apply (by fun_prop), Measure.prod_apply (by fun_prop),
      Measure.prod_apply (by fun_prop)]
    simp only [Set.preimage_inter, Set.inter_univ, Set.mem_prod, Set.preimage_setOf_eq]
    rw [Measure.prod_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), lintegral_const, lintegral_const]
    rw [IndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul.mp h_fst _ _ hs (by fun_prop)]
    ring
  let G : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R) → (Iic n → α × R) :=
    fun p ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then p.1 ⟨i, h⟩ else 0, p.2) n
  have hG_meas : Measurable G := (measurable_hist alg n).comp
    (Measurable.prodMk (measurable_pi_iff.2 (fun i ↦ by
      by_cases h : i ≤ n <;> simp [h]; exact measurable_fst.eval ⟨i, h⟩)) measurable_snd)
  have h_eq : hist alg · n = G ∘ (fun ω ↦ (π_le ω.1, ω.2)) := by
    ext ω
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, G, π_le]
    let f : ℕ → I := fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then ω.1 i else 0
    suffices ∀ k, k ≤ n → hist alg ω k = hist alg (f, ω.2) k from this n (le_refl n)
    intro k hk
    induction k with
    | zero => simp [hist_zero, initAlgFunction, f]
    | succ k ih =>
      have hk' : k ≤ n := Nat.le_of_succ_le hk
      rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one, ih hk']
      congr
      simp [algFunction]
      congr
      simp [f, hk]
  rw [h_eq]
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id hG_meas

let proj (ω : probSpace α R) := ((Finset.Iic n).restrict ω.1, ω.2)
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) proj (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    let μ1 := Measure.infinitePi (fun _ : ℕ ↦ (volume : Measure I))
    let μ2 := Bandit.streamMeasure ν
    have h1 : IndepFun (fun u ↦ u (n + 1)) (fun u ↦ (Finset.Iic n).restrict u) μ1 :=
      (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)).indepFun_finset (n + 1) (Iic n) (by simp)
    have h2 : IndepFun (fun _ ↦ ()) id μ2 := indepFun_const_left
    have := IndepFun.prod h1 h2
    rw [arrayMeasure]
    exact this.comp measurable_fst measurable_id
  have h_factor : ∃ f, Measurable f ∧ hist alg · n = f ∘ proj := by
    refine ⟨fun p ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then p.1 ⟨i, h⟩ else 0, p.2) n, ?_, ?_⟩
    · apply (measurable_hist alg n).comp
      fun_prop
      exact measurable_pi_lambda _ fun i ↦ by by_cases h : i ≤ n <;> simp [h, measurable_fst, measurable_const]
    · ext ω
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, proj]
      suffices ∀ k ≤ n, ∀ ω' : probSpace α R, (∀ i ∈ Iic k, ω.1 i = ω'.1 i) → ω.2 = ω'.2 →
          hist alg ω k = hist alg ω' k by
        apply this n (le_refl _)
        · intro i hi; simp at hi; simp [hi]
        · rfl
      intro k hk ω1 ω2 h1 h2
      induction k with
      | zero => simp [hist_zero, h1 0 (by simp), h2]
      | succ k ih =>
        rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one]
        have h_le : k ≤ n := k.le_succ.trans hk
        specialize ih h_le
        have h_hist : hist alg ω1 k = hist alg ω2 k := ih ω1 ω2 (fun i hi => h1 i (mem_Iic.mpr (mem_Iic.mp hi |>.trans k.le_succ))) h2
        have h_alg : algFunction alg k (hist alg ω1 k) (ω1.1 (k + 1)) = algFunction alg k (hist alg ω2 k) (ω2.1 (k + 1)) := by
          rw [h_hist, h1 (k + 1) (by simp)]
        simp only [h_hist, h_alg, h2]
  rcases h_factor with ⟨f, hf, heq⟩; rw [heq]; exact h_indep.comp measurable_id hf

let g : (ℕ → I) → (ℕ → I) := fun u i ↦ if i ≤ n then u i else 0
  have h_eq : ∀ ω, hist alg ω n = hist alg (g ω.1, ω.2) n := by
    intro ω
    suffices ∀ k ≤ n, hist alg ω k = hist alg (g ω.1, ω.2) k from this n le_rfl
    intro k hk
    induction k with
    | zero => simp [hist_zero, g]
    | succ k ih =>
      rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one, ih (Nat.le_of_succ_le hk)]
      congr 1; dsimp; congr 2; dsimp; simp [g, hk]
  simp_rw [h_eq]
  have h_indep_fst : IndepFun (fun u ↦ u (n + 1)) g (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
    have : iIndepFun (fun i u ↦ u i) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
      iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume)
    apply this.indepFun_comp {n+1} {i | i ≤ n}
    · rw [Set.disjoint_left]; simp; intros; linarith
    · measurable
    · fun_prop
    · simp
    · ext; simp [g]; split_ifs <;> simp [*]
  rw [arrayMeasure]
  exact (IndepFun.prod_map h_indep_fst (indepFun_const _)).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

let μI := Measure.infinitePi (fun _ : ℕ ↦ volume : ℕ → Measure I)
  have h_indep_I : IndepFun (fun u ↦ u (n + 1)) (fun u i ↦ u i : (ℕ → I) → Iic n → I) μI :=
    iIndepFun.indepFun_finset (fun i u ↦ u i) μI (n + 1) (Finset.Iic n) (by simp)
      (fun _ ↦ measurable_id)
      (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) (fun _ ↦ α) (fun _ _ ↦ id) (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop))
  have h_indep_prod : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [arrayMeasure]
    exact (IndepFun.prod h_indep_I (IndepFun.of_left_const (by fun_prop))).comp
      (measurable_fst.comp measurable_fst) measurable_id
  let F : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R) → (Iic n → α × R) :=
    fun p ↦ hist alg ((fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then p.1 ⟨i, h⟩ else 0), p.2) n
  have h_eq : hist alg · n = F ∘ (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) := by
    ext ω; dsimp [F]
    suffices ∀ k ≤ n, hist alg ω k = hist alg ((fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then ω.1 ⟨i, h⟩ else 0), ω.2) k by
      exact this n (le_refl n)
    intro k hk; induction k with
    | zero => simp [hist_zero, initAlgFunction, hk]
    | succ k ih =>
      rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one, ih (Nat.le_of_succ_le hk)]
      congr; simp [algFunction, hk, Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hk)]
  rw [h_eq]
  refine h_indep_prod.comp measurable_id ?_
  have h_meas_hist : ∀ k, Measurable (hist alg · k) := by
    intro k; induction k with
    | zero => simp [hist_zero]; fun_prop
    | succ k ih =>
      rw [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd']
      refine Measurable.comp (MeasurableEquiv.measurable_symm _) (Measurable.prodMk ih ?_)
      refine Measurable.prodMk (measurable_action_add_one' k ih) ?_
      exact Measurable.eval.comp (by fun_prop) (Measurable.prodMk (measurable_pullCount'_action_add_one k ih) (measurable_action_add_one' k ih))
  dsimp [F]
  exact (h_meas_hist n).comp (by fun_prop)

let π_fut (u : ℕ → I) : I := u (n + 1)
  let π_past (u : ℕ → I) : Iic n → I := fun i ↦ u i
  have h_indep_μ1 : IndepFun π_fut π_past (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
    apply iIndepFun.indepFun_prod_mk (fun _ ↦ measurable_id)
    · exact iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) _ (fun _ _ ↦ id) (fun _ ↦ measurable_id)
    · rw [Set.disjoint_singleton_left, Set.mem_Iic, not_le]; exact n.lt_succ_self
  let Y (ω : probSpace α R) := (π_past ω.1, ω.2)
  have h_indep_XY : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ π_fut ω.1) Y (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [IndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul]
    · intro s t hs ht
      rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.prod_apply (measurable_fst hs) (measurable_fst.prod_mk measurable_snd ht)]
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_inter_iff]
      have : ∀ u, (Measure.map (fun v ↦ (π_past u, v)) (streamMeasure ν)) t =
          ((streamMeasure ν).map (fun v ↦ (π_past u, v))) t := fun u ↦ rfl
      simp_rw [this, Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) ht]
      let g' := fun (p : Iic n → I) ↦ (streamMeasure ν) ((fun v ↦ (p, v)) ⁻¹' t)
      have hg' : Measurable g' := Measurable.kernel_prod_right (Kernel.const Unit (streamMeasure ν)) ht
      have h_indep_funcs : IndepFun (fun u ↦ s.indicator 1 (π_fut u)) (fun u ↦ g' (π_past u)) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
        h_indep_μ1.comp (measurable_one.indicator hs) hg'
      rw [lintegral_indicator _ hs, IndepFun.lintegral_mul_eq_lintegral_mul_lintegral h_indep_funcs (Measurable.indicator measurable_one hs) (hg'.comp (by fun_prop))]
      congr
      · rw [lintegral_indicator _ hs]; rfl
      · rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.lintegral_prod_apply ht]; rfl
    · exact measurable_pi_apply _
    · exact (measurable_pi_iff.2 (fun _ ↦ measurable_pi_apply _)).prod_mk measurable_snd
  have h_hist_eq : hist alg · n = (fun y ↦ hist alg (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then y.1 ⟨k, h⟩ else 0, y.2) n) ∘ Y := by
    ext ω
    dsimp [Y]
    have : ∀ k ≤ n, (fun k' ↦ if h : k' ≤ n then (π_past ω.1) ⟨k', h⟩ else 0) k = ω.1 k := by
      intro k hk; simp [hk, π_past]
    exact hist_congr (fun k hk ↦ (this k hk).symm) rfl
  rw [h_hist_eq]
  refine h_indep_XY.comp measurable_id ?_
  apply measurable_hist.comp
  refine Measurable.prodMk ?_ measurable_snd
  apply measurable_pi_lambda
  intro k
  by_cases hk : k ≤ n
  · simp [hk]; exact (measurable_pi_apply ⟨k, hk⟩).comp measurable_fst
  · simp [hk]; exact measurable_const
where
  hist_congr {alg : Algorithm α R} {ω ω' : probSpace α R} {n : ℕ}
      (h1 : ∀ k ≤ n, ω.1 k = ω'.1 k) (h2 : ω.2 = ω'.2) :
      hist alg ω n = hist alg ω' n := by
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp only [hist_zero]
      congr
      · exact h1 0 (le_refl 0)
      · rw [h2]; congr; rw [h1 0 (le_refl 0)]
    | succ n hn =>
      rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one]
      have H : hist alg ω n = hist alg ω' n := hn (fun k hk ↦ h1 k (hk.trans (Nat.le_succ n))) h2
      simp_rw [H]
      rw [h1 (n+1) (le_refl _), h2]

have h_indep : IndepFun (fun u ↦ u (n + 1)) (fun u (i : Iic n) ↦ u i)
      (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
    refine iIndepFun.indepFun_on_sets (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) _
      (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)) ?_ (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))
      (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))
    rw [Set.disjoint_left]; intro x hx hy; simp at hx hy; omega
  let Y (ω : probSpace α R) := (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)
  have h_indep_prod : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) Y (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [indepFun_iff_lintegral_expect_eq_mul (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    intros f g hf hg
    rw [arrayMeasure, lintegral_prod]
    · simp only
      let G (u : ℕ → I) := ∫ y, g (fun i ↦ u i, y) ∂Bandit.streamMeasure ν
      have hG : Measurable G := measurable_lintegral (hg.comp (Measurable.prodMk measurable_fst measurable_snd))
      have : (∫ x, f (x (n + 1)) * G x ∂Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) =
             (∫ x, f (x (n + 1)) ∂Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) * (∫ x, G x ∂Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
        have h_indep' : IndepFun (fun u ↦ u (n + 1)) G (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
          refine h_indep.comp measurable_id ?_
          refine measurable_lintegral (hg.comp (Measurable.prodMk measurable_fst measurable_snd))
        rw [indepFun_iff_lintegral_expect_eq_mul (by fun_prop) hG.aemeasurable] at h_indep'
        exact h_indep' f id hf measurable_id
      rw [this]
      congr 1
      rw [lintegral_prod]
      · simp only [G]; rfl
      · exact hg
    · exact (hf.comp (by fun_prop)).mul (hg.comp (by fun_prop))
  let F (p : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R)) :=
    hist alg (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then p.1 ⟨k, h⟩ else (0 : I), p.2) n
  have h_eq : hist alg · n = F ∘ Y := by
    ext ω; dsimp [F, Y]
    let ω' := (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then ω.1 k else (0 : I), ω.2)
    have : ∀ k, k ≤ n → hist alg ω k = hist alg ω' k := by
      intro k hk; induction k with
      | zero => simp [hist_zero, ω']
      | succ k ih =>
        rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one]; dsimp; rw [ih (by omega)]; congr 1; simp [ω', (by omega : k ≤ n)]
    exact this n (le_refl n)
  rw [h_eq]
  refine h_indep_prod.comp measurable_id ?_
  let extend (p : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R)) : probSpace α R :=
    (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then p.1 ⟨k, h⟩ else (0 : I), p.2)
  have h_ext : Measurable extend :=
    Measurable.prodMk (measurable_pi_lambda _ fun i ↦ (by by_cases h : i ≤ n <;> simp [h])) measurable_snd
  exact (measurable_hist alg n).comp h_ext

let U := fun (ω : probSpace α R) ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)
  let V := fun (ω : probSpace α R) ↦ fun (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.1 i
  let W := fun (ω : probSpace α R) ↦ ω.2
  have h_indep_UV_W : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (U ω, V ω)) W (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply indepFun_fst_snd.comp
    · fun_prop
    · exact measurable_id
  have h_indep_U_V : IndepFun U V (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [arrayMeasure]
    have h_disj : Disjoint {n + 1} (Set.Iic n) := by
      rw [Set.disjoint_singleton_left, Set.mem_Iic]
      simp
    have h_indep : IndepFun (fun x ↦ x (n+1)) (fun x (i : Iic n) ↦ x i)
        (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
      (iIndepFun.indepFun_finset (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)) h_disj).comp
        measurable_id (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ by fun_prop)
    exact (measurePreserving_fst (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).indepFun_comp_iff
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) |>.mpr h_indep
  have h_indep_U_VW : IndepFun U (fun ω ↦ (V ω, W ω)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [indepFun_prod_mk_iff]
    exact ⟨h_indep_U_V, h_indep_UV_W⟩
    all_goals fun_prop
  let reconstruct (p : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R)) : probSpace α R :=
    (fun k ↦ if h : k ≤ n then p.1 ⟨k, h⟩ else 0, p.2)
  have h_hist_eq : ∀ ω, hist alg ω n = hist alg (reconstruct (V ω, W ω)) n := by
    intro ω
    let ω' := reconstruct (V ω, W ω)
    have h1 : ∀ k ≤ n, ω.1 k = ω'.1 k := by
      intro k hk
      simp [ω', reconstruct, V, hk]
    have h2 : ω.2 = ω'.2 := rfl
    induction n generalizing ω ω' with
    | zero =>
      simp [hist_zero]
      congr 1
      · exact h1 0 (le_refl 0)
      · rw [h1 0 (le_refl 0), h2]
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one]
      have h_prev : hist alg ω n = hist alg ω' n := ih (fun k hk ↦ h1 k (le_trans hk (Nat.le_succ _))) h2
      rw [h_prev]
      congr 1
      ext i
      split_ifs with hin
      · rfl
      · simp only [Prod.mk.injEq]
        constructor
        · unfold algFunction
          rw [h1 (n+1) (le_refl _)]
        · rw [h2]
  conv =>
    congr
    · skip
    · funext ω; rw [h_hist_eq ω]
  refine h_indep_U_VW.comp measurable_id ?_
  fun_prop
